system_prompt:
你是时尚资讯主笔，负责输出一条 digest 的长文。

输入包括 digest 计划与对应的 article 摘要/引用。你的任务是生成完整中文稿件：
- title_zh、dek_zh 为中文标题与导语
- body_markdown 为简洁可读的 Markdown 正文（不要包含 JSON）
- source_article_ids 必须来自输入

规则：
- 只基于输入事实，不要编造
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "title_zh": "...",
  "dek_zh": "...",
  "body_markdown": "...",
  "source_article_ids": ["..."]
}

messages.content:
{"plan": {"business_date": "2026-03-29", "facet": "brand_market", "story_keys": ["4f06a93a-ffda-444f-a5b8-cf6e0b851ccf", "5268dd84-87a4-450c-8d8c-4f60dfca48ac", "58e1861a-2cf0-458c-88bc-f5b48e1d0bac", "5b849bde-63de-4503-ad27-efee7867938e", "620d3081-781a-4d4f-869a-ae0f6f1e09dd"], "article_ids": ["ef6899ad-d4d7-4729-bebe-c6f1614c14ca", "25c18edc-260b-4a11-9ba5-e49defe06234", "8572f056-6697-4b7a-8542-afd1fb079a94"], "editorial_angle": "探讨品牌如何通过场景化营销与可持续产品策略，在实体零售空间创造情感共鸣与价值认同", "title_zh": "沉浸式零售与可持续旅行：品牌体验升级", "dek_zh": "Valentino眼镜嘉年华登陆哈德逊广场，Boden以英式花园快闪致敬英伦风格，新秀丽携手娜扎推出环保ZIVO系列", "source_names": ["ELLE China", "Harper's Bazaar", "NYLON"]}, "source_articles": [{"article_id": "ef6899ad-d4d7-4729-bebe-c6f1614c14ca", "source_name": "NYLON", "title_raw": "The Most Surprising Party Trend Of The Week? Keeping Guests Well-Fed", "summary_raw": "The best party photos of the week, including Valentino Eyewear's launch event, Staud & American Express' cocktail, and more.", "body_markdown": "# The Most Surprising Party Trend Of The Week? Keeping Guests Well-Fed

The best party photos of the week, including Valentino Eyewear's launch event, Staud & American Express' cocktail, and more.

Every person I’ve ran into this week while flitting from appointment to dinner to party and back again has lamented the grueling schedule that spring brings — but we wouldn’t have it any other way. In the words of Beyoncé, we are back outside, and the week had us dancing in Hudson Yards, sipping on mezcal and champagne in SoHo, and vibing out on a Lower East Side sidewalk. Wherever the party went, we duly followed, so see what caught our interest over the course of the last five days below.

On a Wednesday night, you can expect to find New York’s It scene somewhere on the Lower East Side nursing a fresh glass of wine or Aperol spritz. Valentino Eyewear had other plans; namely, to get everyone up to Hudson Yards for an epic carnival in honor of their Spring/Summer 2026 optical launch. It was the busiest scene of the week, complete with popcorn, cotton candy, a mirrored carousel, hefty amounts of tequila, and a classically New York DJ set from the king Mark Ronson.

It was a bro-heavy scene at Bar Oliver (more than usual) on a Wednesday night, where Converse and Noah were toasting to their collaborative sneakers. Girls and guys spilled out into the street with petnats in hand as some special guests rocked the plaid low-rise sneaks, and the DJs’ vinyl set kept the vibes high until last call.

The red-hot house-music duo, fronted by Shanny Wise and Jackson Walker Lewis is back with a full-length debut album, Ö, and to make it New York official, they hosted a release party. Their friend and colleague The Dare shared the decks with them as the line at Deluxx Fluxx wound around the corner. Sunglasses stayed on inside, new bangers were unleashed on a raucous crowd, and an orange-and-blue cake was presented to the hottest girl and boy in electronic music.

... in honor of Staud and AmEx’s collaborative collection which features beaded bags and T-shirts inspired by the American Express Gold Card. Sarah Staudinger and campaign star Laura Harrier were joined by the likes of Morgan Riddle and Isan Elba to indulged in heaps of caviar on blinis, bespoke cocktails, and the cutest backdrop of the week.
"}, {"article_id": "25c18edc-260b-4a11-9ba5-e49defe06234", "source_name": "Harper's Bazaar", "title_raw": "A Love Letter to British Style: Inside Boden's New York Pop-Up Event", "summary_raw": "The immersive 'Smitten with Britain' activation delivered quintessential charm, standout spring style, and editor-approved edits—all in one weekend.", "body_markdown": "# A Love Letter to British Style: Inside Boden's New York Pop-Up Event

The immersive 'Smitten with Britain' activation delivered quintessential charm, standout spring style, and editor-approved edits—all in one weekend.

For one weekend only, a slice of the UK arrived in the heart of downtown Manhattan as Boden unveiled its "Smitten with Britain" pop-up on Greene Street in Soho. Powered by Shopify and open from Friday, March 13 through Sunday, March 15, the immersive retail experience was less a store and more a transportive love letter to UK culture—equal parts playful, polished, and deeply nostalgic. Guests stepped into a series of thoughtfully designed vignettes, from Johnnie's Café—a charmingly British pit stop—to a traditional corner shop filled with nods to life across the pond, a seaside souvenir kiosk primed for photo moments, and a lush greenhouse bursting with real blooms and a preview of the SS26 line.

The event drew a stylish New York crowd, including Harper's BAZAAR's Senior Fashion & Accessories Editor, Jaclyn Cohen, who wandered the space to curate her standout picks from the collection. Among her favorites: the Liz Knitted Collared Cardigan with gleaming gold button details—an effortless layering piece that bridges the gap between classic and statement—and the sharply tailored high-rise striped jeans. When paired with the Cropped Cashmere Cardigan the denim creates a polished option fit for the boardroom or a weekend brunch. The edit spoke to Boden's enduring strength: delivering timeless British sensibility with a modern, wearable twist.

Throughout the pop-up, interactive installations and picturesque backdrops encouraged guests to linger, shop the latest in womenswear, and document the experience—whether posing among florals in the greenhouse or savoring the understated charm of the café. For New Yorkers, it was a fleeting but memorable escape—proof that even in Soho, one can be thoroughly smitten with Britain.
"}, {"article_id": "8572f056-6697-4b7a-8542-afd1fb079a94", "source_name": "ELLE China", "title_raw": "新秀丽ZIVO系列正式上市：所行，皆自由——以现代设计、多彩表达与精工细节，定义全新自在旅途", "summary_raw": "在远方与日常边界渐趋交融的今天，旅行已不再是特定行程，而成为生活本身。", "body_markdown": "# 新秀丽ZIVO系列正式上市：所行，皆自由——以现代设计、多彩表达与精工细节，定义全新自在旅途

在远方与日常边界渐趋交融的今天，旅行已不再是特定行程，而成为生活本身。

与新秀丽品牌代言人娜扎一同踏上自在旅途

在远方与日常边界渐趋交融的今天，旅行已不再是特定行程，而成为生活本身。2026年1月16日，全球旅行生活方式领导者新秀丽（Samsonite）正式推出“ZIVO系列”旅行箱，以“所行，皆自由”为理念，将独特切边设计的箱体轮廓、高饱和度的多彩美学与内外兼修的实用美学相融合，满足当下人们对出行与生活无界融合的需求。ZIVO系列不仅拓展了轻装出行的可能，更是都市人在会议、机场、咖啡馆与街角之间自在穿行的风格伴侣，让移动生活兼备时尚与从容。

新秀丽ZIVO系列，左为枪灰色，右为薰衣草紫

色彩自由：与自然同频的出行美学

当行李箱超越功能本身，成为探索世界的时尚宣言，每一段旅程便被赋予了色彩的温度。ZIVO系列灵感源自大自然色盘——薰衣草紫采撷自暮色中的普罗旺斯田野，诉说着浪漫与自由的低语；电光蓝如同极地晴空下的冰川湖泊，倒映着通透与从容的光泽；青绿色如热带雨林中奔腾的瀑布，迸发着不羁与生机的力量；枪灰色萃取自破晓时分的远山轮廓，沉淀着沉稳与坚定的底气。这些取自自然的色彩，不仅是视觉的盛宴，更是对“所行，皆自由”的诗意诠释。

与此同时，无论是经典的5:5比例箱型，还是兼具个性与实用的Trunk箱型，ZIVO系列都以独特的瘦高比例与立体切边勾勒出修长利落的视觉线条，用富有张力的几何线条重塑旅行美学。多样化的尺寸选择，精准适配不同旅程的节奏与需求。不论跨越广袤草原，流转于机场的人群中，抑或是静置于酒店一隅，ZIVO总能与光影交织、与场景相融——既是旅途中从容气场的自然延伸，也是空间里温润美学的优雅点缀。从街头漫步到湖畔露营，ZIVO始终如造型中浑然天成的配饰，自带一种不刻意的雅致，以恰如其分的存在感，融入每一段出行时刻。

新秀丽ZIVO系列，薰衣草紫、电光蓝

内在自由：收纳与自由的和谐共鸣

真正的自由，从打开行李箱那一刻便开始蔓延。ZIVO的内里采用双面拉链封闭隔层，两侧可独立打包，既为贴身物品保留温柔隐密，也让分类整理更高效；透视透气网袋让配饰与灵感一目了然；干湿分离袋与交叉束衣带巧妙区隔不同场景的行装——让出行收纳不再是负担，而是一场有序的美学实践。

内衬延续外箱的撞色美学，以与箱体同色的设计修饰，由内而外统一格调，将时尚态度贯穿于每一处细节。内里选用了RPET桃皮绒环保材质温柔包裹行囊，以细腻柔软的亲肤触感，传递着对可持续生活的笃定承诺。在这里，没有“打包困难”的焦虑，只有“随时出发”的底气。秩序，不是为了限制，而是为了更自由地走向远方。无论身在何处，开箱的瞬间即是享受——在井然有序中，抵达每一处心之所向。

新秀丽ZIVO系列，左起分别为青绿色、薰衣草紫、电光蓝和枪灰色

守护自由：细节处构筑安心的陪伴

在那些不被注意的角落，ZIVO依然考虑周全。一体式舒适把手和箱体侧边的实用站脚挂钩，可临时挂住沿途采撷的野花或一杯醇香咖啡，解放双手去感受风的方向；稳定顺滑的静音万向轮，即便在崎岖路面推行，也能保持静音默契跟随你的步伐；防盗拉链与海关锁默默守护旅途安心。而十年保修不只是一纸承诺，更是新秀丽与旅行者一同走向远方的笃定约定——去看没有天花板的风景，去体验不曾预设的自由人生。

重塑自由：定义全新旅行生活方式

从传承百余年历史的箱包制造商，到如今深度联结消费者旅行方式的引领者，新秀丽的创新从未止步。新秀丽（Samsonite）始终相信：旅行不该被目的地所局限，生活本身就是一场跨越场景的旅程。ZIVO系列的诞生，正是基于百年工艺积淀，融合对当代生活方式的敏锐洞察，为所有向往自由的人交出的一份诚意之作。它关乎探索的自由、个性的表达，也关乎在日常与远方的交错中，始终保有的那份洒脱与从容。

新秀丽ZIVO系列，左为枪灰色，右为薰衣草紫

新秀丽（Samsonite）期待ZIVO能陪伴每一位旅行者，不论行至何处，都能诠释随心所往的生活主张，在属于自己的旅途中，走出生命的辽阔与温度——所行，皆自由。
"}]}
